name: Great Chocolate Cake (& Strawberry Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Mix cocoa with boiling water in a bowl, stirring until smooth. Cool in the refrigerator while preparing other ingredients.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with sugar on high speed for 5 minutes. Add eggs and vanilla.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into the mixture. Mix on low speed, alternating with cocoa and liquid, starting and ending with flour (do not overbeat).
4. Divide batter evenly between two round pans (9 x 1 1/2 inches) lined with buttered wax paper. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out dry.
5. Cool cakes in pans for 10 minutes before transferring to racks to cool completely.
6. For the strawberry chocolate shortcake dessert, use one layer of cake. Melt semi-sweet chocolate and drizzle over fresh strawberries on top of the cake layer. Chill until set.
7. The second cake layer can be frozen or used for other chocolate desserts. To prepare the shortcake, whip cream with powdered sugar and vanilla, then spread over the cake layer and arrange fresh strawberries before serving. Makes 8 servings.
